mode: agent
description: Creates a new issue on GitHub documenting a feature for the product backlog.

# Create issue documenting a feature

Create a new issue on GitHub following issue template stored in
#file:../ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature.md and the description provided by me. Feel free to look at the other content in the #file:../../docs/ folder. Ignore any source code currently in the repository to keep the issue information pure.
